zh.Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯
zh.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGF於大約1496年出生在英國素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。她於大約1525年與William Page 13GGF在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGF于大约1496年出生在英国素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。她于大约1525年与William Page 13GGF在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可瓦爾申馬 勒 維洛福斯。

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGF was born about 1496, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England. She married William Page 13GGF about 1525, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1559, in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズ
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGFは約1496年にイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズで生まれた。約1525年にイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズでWilliam Page 13GGFと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年にイギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクワルシャム ル ウィロウズにて埋葬された。

ko.Walsham le Willows, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스
ko.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGF(은)는 대략 1496년 영국 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 William Page 13GGF(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 월샤 일 윌로스에 묻혔다.

ru.Walsham Le Willows, Suffolk, England: валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Anne or Marion 13GGF родилась около 1496 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Page 13GGF около 1525 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1559 г. в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности валшам л уиллоус, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
